betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The tide turns!
The waves of Undead are breaking.
Their chain of command, it falters.
And even now, I know I am acting exactly as my enemy wanted.
Making me use all of the weapons at my disposal.
Fodder carefully placed to reveal all the aces up my sleeve...
Enemies powerful enough, and organied enough, for me to use all that I have. 
If or when I eventually come face to face with the Meatball Man, he will have full knowledge of my arsenal.
But he does not know my resolve. He does not know my rage...
